# Pranav Dhiran

AI Engineer and Researcher focused on LLM systems, agentic infrastructure, MCP servers, and RF plus AI systems.

## About
- ECE undergraduate and self-taught AI/ML engineer.
- Two-time Smart India Hackathon National Finalist.
- Focus: transformer training, multi-agent systems, MCP server engineering, software-defined radio, and LLM post-training.

## Case Studies
- Medaura: multi-agent pharmacy system with LangGraph orchestration, ChromaDB RAG, Langfuse traces, and multilingual workflow support. Case study: https://pranavdhiran.me/case-studies/medaura
- Small Language Model From Scratch - TinyStories: GPT-style transformer trained from scratch with a custom BPE tokenizer, AMP training, and validation loss around 2.1. Case study: https://pranavdhiran.me/case-studies/tinystories
- GNU Radio MCP Server: LLM-to-SDR bridge with 13 validated tools over ZMQ and XML-RPC for GNU Radio control. Case study: https://pranavdhiran.me/case-studies/gnuradio-mcp
- RF Watch: passive real-time RF spectrum monitor using HackRF One, GNU Radio, Welch PSD features, and traceable physical-layer evidence. Case study: https://pranavdhiran.me/case-studies/rf-watch

## External Proof
- GitHub: https://github.com/Pranav-d33
- Medaura live system: https://aipharmacyproject-blond.vercel.app
- TinyStories source: https://github.com/Pranav-d33/small_language_model_from_scratch-TinyStories-
- GNU Radio MCP source: https://github.com/Pranav-d33/gnuradio-mcp-server
- RF Watch source: https://github.com/Pranav-d33/RFwatch
